title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid shares his bootstrapped playbook for growing Chatbase to $10M ARR without external funding. The video covers bootstrapping philosophy, product-led growth, customer retention, SEO strategy, pricing experimentation, and decision-making frameworks for early-stage SaaS founders.
